headline: Ladenburg Thalmann Initiates Coverage On Host Hotels & Resorts with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $23
summary: Ladenburg Thalmann  analyst Floris Van Dijkum   initiates coverage on Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Buy rating and announces Price Target of $23.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $23
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Patrick Scholes   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Buy and raises the price target from $21 to $23.
